title: YOUTH SPORTS - 211info
text: ASHLAND FAMILY YMCA YOUTH SPORTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of youth sports programs that promote skill development, teamwork, and sportsmanship in a fun and supportive environment. 540 YMCA Way Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Ages 3-12 Hours: Varies Email (541) 482-9622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 482-9622 Main phone Main phone (541) 482-9622 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more information FEES: Varies, financial assistance available for those who qualify DOCUMENTS: Completed registration forms; health information may be required for certain programs LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement nterpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-6pm, Sunday 9am-4pm Services: Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - PRESCHOOL INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - AFTER SCHOOL CARE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - DEBOER SUMMER CAMP LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - GYMNASTICS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SCHOOL’S OUT DAYS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SWIMMING LESSONS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
